steps.title: Step 2
steps.content: Add 34r to both sides: q = s + 34r.

choiceAnalysis:
• '$q = s - 34r$': Subtracting 34r again doubles the subtraction; incorrect. ✗
  • '$q = s + 34r$': Adding 34r to both sides of q - 34r = s gives q = s + 34r. ✓
  • '$q = 34rs$': Multiplies terms that were added/subtracted; wrong operation entirely. ✗
  • '$q = -\frac{s}{34r}$': Involves division and negation with no algebraic basis from the original equation. ✗
That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
